crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Possible Zeus GameOver/FluBot Related DGA NXDOMAIN Responses
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp any 53 -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Possible Zeus GameOver/FluBot Related DGA NXDOMAIN Responses"; byte_test:1,&,128,2; byte_test:1,&,1,3; byte_test:1,&,2,3; content:"|00 01 00 00 00 01|"; offset:4; depth:6; pcre:"/^..[\x0d-\x20][a-z]{13,32}(?:\x03(?:biz|com|net|org)|\x04info|\x02ru)\x00\x00\x01\x00\x01/Rs"; threshold: type both, track by_dst, count 12, seconds 120; reference:url,vrt-blog.snort.org/2014/03/decoding-domain-generation-algorithms.html; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2018316; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2014_03_25, updated_at 2023_05_19;)
alert ( gid:122; sid:1; rev:2; msg:"(port_scan) TCP portscan"; metadata: rule-type preproc; classtype:attempted-recon;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY External IP Check myexternalip.com
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY External IP Check myexternalip.com"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.host; content:"myexternalip.com"; depth:16; endswith; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2019980; rev:6; metadata:created_at 2014_12_20, updated_at 2020_09_17;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO HTTP Request for External IP Check (ip-addr .es)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO HTTP Request for External IP Check (ip-addr .es)"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.host; content:"ip-addr.es"; pcre:"/^(?:\x3a\d{1,5})?$/R"; reference:url,blogs.cisco.com/security/talos/cryptowall-2; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2020105; rev:5; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2015_01_07, deployment Perimeter, deployment SSLDecrypt, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2023_05_22;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (http_inspect) HTTP Content-Length message body was truncated
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:119; sid:260; rev:1; msg:"(http_inspect) HTTP Content-Length message body was truncated"; metadata: rule-type preproc; classtype:unknown;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* Path Without Referer
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* Path Without Referer"; flow:established,to_server; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"/wp-"; http_uri; http_header_names; content:!"Referer"; threshold:type limit, track by_src, seconds 60, count 1; classtype:bad-unknown;sid:2610312; rev:1;)

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the modification of the registry to disable a system restore on the computer

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)

values.Description: Command Line Interface for Microsoft\xae Volume Shadow Copy Service

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Volume Shadow Copy Vsstrace.dll Load
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the image load of VSS DLL by uncommon executables

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious DNS Query for IP Lookup Service APIs
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects DNS queries for IP lookup services such as "api.ipify.org" originating from a non browser process.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Remote Thread Creation By Uncommon Source Image
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects uncommon processes creating remote threads.
A General detection for files being created in the Windows startup directory. This could be an indicator of persistence.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Network Connection to IP Lookup Service APIs
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects external IP address lookups by non-browser processes via services such as "api.ipify.org". This could be indicative of potential post compromise internet test activity.
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects an uncommon svchost parent process
